subject: docs: fix documentation inaccuracies found in cross-repo audit
body:
- package.json name: `tool-till-tees-api` → `tool-till-tees` (match repo name)
- USER_GUIDE.md: field type count "12" → "13" (text listed 13, number said 12)
- CLAUDE.md: Sancio endpoint count "23" → "26" (missed cron + accept-handshake)
- README.md: added missing cron endpoints to Sancio table (nudge, auto-expire)
- Updated SESSION_NOTES.md and HISTORY.md
